_meta.purpose: InnerThought 自 pacing vocab — 喂哪些 self-signal evidence 给思考脑, 让 LLM 自决 NEXT_INTERVAL (不在 .py 写 if 规则).
_meta.philosophy: 准则 6 三维耦合: (1) 数据强耦合 raw signal 进 SWM (publish 'inner_thought_self_signal'), (2) 决策集中 LLM (思考脑 prompt 看 signal 自决降频), (3) 持久化 CLI (本 vocab + scripts/pacing_dump.py). 准则 8 优雅: 不加 Python if 链, 不写 magic number 阈值. Sir 真意 anchor: '应该动态从对话中提取, python 规则无法覆盖的部分引入 LLM'.
consumer: jarvis_inner_thought_daemon.py:_collect_evidence (读 signals_enabled 决定喂哪些字段)
jarvis_inner_thought_daemon.py:_build_prompt (读 prompt_signal_block 决定 prompt 段措辞)
_meta.doc: docs/JARVIS_THINKING_TO_AGENCY_DESIGN.md (P10 子节) + docs/JARVIS_PYTHON_STYLE.md 准则 6 范式
_meta.design_rule: 本 vocab 只配置 '喂哪些 signal + 多长 lookback + signal 字段名'. NEVER 配置 '触发 X 就 Y' 类 if 规则 — 那是 LLM 自决的事 (准则 6 反硬编码).
_meta.history_anchor: Sir 2026-05-27 22:11 真问: '思考会动态变频吗? 会发现自己不用太担心吗? 一直在想, 经常想重复事情'. Audit 现状: tick interval 只看物理 idle, 不看 self-quality / repetition / concern pressure. 治本: 不加 Python rule, 喂 evidence 给 LLM 自决.

self_recent_quality._note: avg sal of last N thoughts; rate of actionable!=none; rate of mediocre (sal<0.5 + actionable=none + A/D/E)

self_thread_diversity._note: unique thread_id count in last N; share of top thread (e.g. 4/5=0.8 → 主脑应自决 'I keep cycling on same thread, slow down')

overall_concern_pressure._note: max/avg severity of active concerns; high_severity_count = concerns with sev>=0.7; recent SWM events count in last hour (proxy 'something happening')

prompt_signal_block._note: tone 必须中性事实 (NEVER 加 'so you should slow down' 类指令 — LLM 自决, 不教). 仅描述 raw signal: 'last 5 thoughts avg sal=0.3, 4/5 same thread X, max concern severity 0.4'.
prompt_signal_block.header: [YOUR RECENT PACING SIGNAL — fact only, you decide if/how to pace]

swm_publish._note: publish 每 tick — 主脑 / Reflector / Dashboard 看. ttl 30min 防膨胀. salience 0.3 不挤 top 但可查.

recent_thoughts_lookback._note: 🆕 [governor Phase 1 F2 / Sir 2026-05-29 拍板] 思考脑 evidence 'recent_thoughts' lookback 两维: 取 last `min` 分钟内的 thought, 上限 `n` 条. 修复缺口 ①: 旧版硬编码 last 3 思考脑看不到 30min 内重复 22 次. n range 1-50, min range 1-180 (sanity cap). 详 docs/JARVIS_THINKING_BRAIN_GOVERNOR_DESIGN.md §5 F2.

topic_distribution._note: 🆕 [governor Phase 1 F3 / Sir 2026-05-29 拍板] 思考脑 evidence 加 [TOPIC DISTRIBUTION] block — count thoughts by thread_id in window. 当 occurrence ≥ warning_threshold (default 10) 标 ⚠️ 提示 LLM 考虑 let_go. lookback_min 1-360, warning_threshold 1-100, max_topics_shown 1-30 (sanity cap). E4 evidence 维度化: LLM 视觉看'我 22 次想同事' → 自然激活 let_go. 详 docs/JARVIS_THINKING_BRAIN_GOVERNOR_DESIGN.md §5 F3.

self_reflection_dedup._note: 🆕 [governor Phase 1 F6 改 2 / Sir 2026-05-29 拍板] 思考脑 B 类反思 append 心声 (主脑 SOUL inject 看心声 = 看到反思) 前 jaccard dedup: 窗内 (window_min 30 default) 同 topic (jaccard ≥ threshold 0.6) 跳, 防 1h 22 次重复反思淹没主脑. enabled false 关 dedup (危险, 测试用). window_min 1-180, jaccard 0.0-1.0 (sanity cap). 修复缺口 ③: 旧路只 publish SWM (0 consumer) 主脑看不到 B 类反思. 详 docs/JARVIS_THINKING_BRAIN_GOVERNOR_DESIGN.md §5 F6 改 2.

semantic_thread_merge._note: 🆕 [governor F8 / Sir 2026-06-02 拍板] emergent×F3/F4 张力治本. 根因 (真机 jarvis_20260602_074737 实测): emergent 下主脑对同语义主题 (e.g. keyrouter) 反复声明 new_topic → 23 条同义 thought 散在 11 thread_id, 单 thread max=3 < F3/F4 阈值 → let_go 元能力永不触发, 反刍不止. 治本: LLM 声明 new_topic 时, 若 thought 文本与近 lookback_min 内某 thread jaccard >= threshold → 归并入该既有 thread (语义连续). thread_id 从此追踪'语义现实'而非'每 tick 新声明', F3/F4/let_go 全部自动复活. enabled false → 回纯 LLM thread 判定 (准则 7 Sir 可关). jaccard 0.0-1.0, lookback 1-360, max_candidates 1-50 (sanity).

_meta.purpose: β.6 Phase 1b — 思考脑自标 NEXT_ATTENTION_FOCUS 用的合法 channel 白名单. 持久化在此 (准则 6: 不在 .py 硬编码 list).
_meta.consumer: jarvis_inner_thought_daemon.py:_build_channel_view (合法 channel 才能被 focus_hint 标 deep, 其余忽略)
_meta.design_rule: LLM 在 prompt 教学下学会标 channel 名, 但 invalid 名静默忽略 (不破坏). 加新 channel 需 Sir CLI 改本 vocab 或人工 review.
